adamant_axe.description: The Adamant Axe can be equipped as a weapon and used as a Woodcutting tool.
adamant_axe.acquisition: Crafted through Crafting at level 30 in the Inventory from Adamant Axe Head x1 and Maple Handle w/ Strap x1. It is also sold by the Advanced Woodsman.
adamant_axe.uses: It can be equipped for combat and requires Attack 30; it also functions as a Woodcutting tool. It can be sold to Tanner Rusk in Starter Town and the Advanced Woodsman.

adamant_boots.description: The Adamant Boots can be equipped in the feet slot.
adamant_boots.acquisition: Forged through Smithing at level 31 on an Anvil with a Hammer from Adamant Bar x2.
adamant_boots.uses: It can be equipped in the feet slot and requires Defense 30.

adamant_helmet.acquisition: Forged through Smithing at level 33 on an Anvil with a Hammer from Adamant Bar x5.
